name: wstudio-learn
description: W Studio online course platform with Firebase Auth, PayPal Checkout, and multilingual course access.

scripts.check: node --check api/_lib/adminAccess.js && node --check api/config.js && node --check api/me.js && node --check api/progress.js && node --check api/certificate.js && node --check api/paypal/create-order.js && node --check api/paypal/capture-order.js && node --check api/ai/course-guide.js && node --check api/ai/speech.js && node --check assets/js/wstudio-platform.js && node --check assets/js/wstudio-i18n.js
